title: bidens malmei
intro: Bidens malmei, also known as Malme's beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, Bidens malmei has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Bidens malmei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
